author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add gui (#72)

* Added UI to SupaTrigga

* fix: remove duplicate CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES line from CommonSettings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: revert PluginProcessor formatting, apply only functional editor changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add missing trailing newlines to new editor files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove platform-specific Inter font, use system default on all platforms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: replace string-based style dispatch with Section enum

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: reformat editor files to match project conventions (4-space, Allman)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: embed Inter Bold font as binary resource

Inter-Bold.otf (SIL OFL) is embedded via juce_add_binary_data and loaded
with Typeface::createSystemTypefaceFor — works on all platforms without
requiring the font to be installed. Falls back to system bold if loading fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove slices/measure suffix from Granularity parameter display

The custom UI has a "SLICES" label; the suffix was redundant and cluttered
the knob's value display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: etheory
message: removed key press as method for changing to dark mode and replaced it with a double-click (#70)

author: Bram de Jong
message: Switched to universal builds for MacOS for those unfortunate to not be on an Arm64 mac machine.

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Restore CLA documents from git history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Create release zips on native platforms to preserve permissions

Each build job now creates its own zip using platform-native tools
(ditto on macOS, zip on Linux, 7z on Windows) instead of re-zipping
on the ubuntu release runner. This fixes macOS standalone apps being
unopenable due to lost executable permissions in the artifact transfer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Fix macOS notarization: drop --deep, exclude LV2, add error handling

- Remove --deep from codesign (unreliable, Apple recommends against it)
- Add signature verification pass before notarization
- Exclude LV2 bundles from notarization zip (not proper macOS bundles)
- Check notarytool status and fetch rejection log on failure
- Fail the workflow on notarization rejection instead of silently continuing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add macOS code signing and notarization to CI

Sign all plugin artifacts (VST3, AU, LV2, Standalone) with Developer ID
certificate, batch-notarize via Apple's notarytool, and staple tickets.
Uses apple-actions/import-codesign-certs for keychain setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Smexoscope: auto-detect OS dark mode, save skin preference

- Default to OS dark mode setting on first load
- Save skin preference with plugin state (persists across sessions)
- Press any key to toggle between light/dark skins

Also: comprehensive CLAUDE.md update with CMake architecture,
plugin patterns, UI components, and troubleshooting guide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Limit CI build parallelism to 2 jobs on all platforms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Refactor CMake: consolidate common settings and disable unused JUCE features

- Move JUCE FetchContent and common plugin settings to CommonSettings.cmake
- Add smartelectronix_fetch_juce() macro and smartelectronix_plugin_common() function
- Remove ccache configuration
- Simplify all 11 plugin CMakeLists.txt files (net -289 lines)

Disable unused JUCE features to speed up builds:
- Camera, CD reader/burner support
- Audio formats: OGG, MP3, FLAC, LAME
- Plugin hosting: VST, VST3, AU, LADSPA, LV2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add shared CMake settings and Smexoscope dark skin toggle

CMake improvements:
- Create cmake/CommonSettings.cmake with shared build settings
  (macOS deployment target, C++17, symbol visibility, PIC)
- Root CMakeLists.txt now includes CommonSettings.cmake
- Each plugin CMakeLists.txt conditionally includes CommonSettings.cmake
  for standalone builds, ensuring consistent settings

Smexoscope dark skin:
- Add dark skin assets to smexoscope/Resources/dark/
- Add setImage() methods to UI components for runtime skin switching
- Press any key to toggle between light and dark skins
- Fix dark skin free_etc.png to include TEMPO option (6 frames)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add symbol visibility settings for plugins

- CMAKE_CXX_VISIBILITY_PRESET hidden
- CMAKE_C_VISIBILITY_PRESET hidden
- CMAKE_VISIBILITY_INLINES_HIDDEN ON
- CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON

Reduces binary size, improves load times, and prevents symbol collisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Fix CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET placement

Move before project() so it takes effect during compiler configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Stereo-only I/O, AU categorization, SupaPhaser presets, CI rolling releases

- All plugins: Add PLUGIN_CHANNEL_CONFIGURATIONS for stereo-only I/O
- All effect plugins: Add AU_MAIN_TYPE kAudioUnitType_Effect
- OnePingOnly: Add PLUGIN_CHANNEL_CONFIGURATIONS "{0, 2}" for synth
- Cyanide2: Fix shaper UI not updating when loading presets
- SupaPhaser: Add 64 factory presets from legacy version
- CI: Release on every push to master (rolling "latest" release)
- Remove version tags in favor of continuous deployment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Restrict plugins to stereo-only I/O, fix Linux build OOM

- Add isBusesLayoutSupported to Bitmurderer, Cyanide2, SupaPhaser
  to restrict them to stereo input/output only
- Limit Linux CI build to 2 parallel jobs to avoid OOM killer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Enable parallel builds in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Set macOS deployment target to 10.13 (High Sierra)

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add Downloads section with link to releases page

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add macOS README for quarantine fix, exclude vst3_helper from Windows

- Add README.md to macOS artifacts explaining xattr -cr fix
- Exclude *_vst3_helper.exe from Windows Standalone folder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Simplify GitHub Actions: remove caching, streamline artifact collection

- Remove all caching (sccache, Ninja) - complexity not worth the benefit
- Single configure/build step for all platforms
- Simplified artifact collection using find with -name
- One upload per OS with artifacts organized in subfolders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Switch to Ninja generator and add Standalone artifacts

- Use Ninja generator on all platforms (required for sccache with MSVC)
- Unified sccache across all platforms
- Add Standalone app collection and upload for all OSes
- Windows uses vcvars64.bat to set up MSVC environment for Ninja

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Switch to Mozilla sccache-action for Windows caching

The hendrikmuhs/ccache-action with sccache variant wasn't
properly using GitHub Actions cache. Using the official
mozilla-actions/sccache-action with SCCACHE_GHA_ENABLED.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Fix Linux artifact collection path

- Add /Release subdirectory to Linux artifact collection path
- Add if-no-files-found: error to fail explicitly on missing artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Fix remaining std::fabsf/powf Linux compatibility issues

Replace std::fabsf with std::fabs and std::powf with std::pow
in crazyivan and madshifta plugins for GCC/Linux compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Fix LV2 and Linux build issues

- Add LV2URI to all plugins (required by JUCE LV2 build)
- Replace std::fabsf with std::fabs (not standard C++)
- Use sccache instead of ccache on Windows in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add LV2 format and Linux builds

- Add LV2 to all plugin FORMATS (supported on macOS and Linux)
- Add ubuntu-latest to CI matrix with JUCE dependencies
- Collect VST3 and LV2 artifacts on Linux
- Release now includes 6 zips: macOS (VST3, AU, LV2), Linux (VST3, LV2), Windows (VST3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Set proper release title in GitHub Actions workflow

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Split release artifacts by OS and plugin format

Release zips are now named per OS and format:
smartelectronix-macOS-VST3.zip, smartelectronix-macOS-AU.zip,
smartelectronix-Windows-VST3.zip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bram de Jong
message:
Add ccache support to speed up builds

- Root CMakeLists.txt: auto-detect and use ccache as compiler launcher
- GitHub Actions: use hendrikmuhs/ccache-action with per-OS cache keys
- Reduces clean rebuild time by ~57% (23min → 10min locally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
